first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in phrasing and the specific examples chosen from the resume to illustrate strengths (e.g., 'DLang, real-time systems' vs. 'GISCollective, CI/CD infrastructure') fall within the expected range of run-to-run variation. The model consistently identified the same core gaps in qualifications regardless of the candidate's work locations.
